---
name: 🔗 Add a Resource
about: Suggest a new helpful link for the SE31 cohort.
title: 'Resource: [Brief Title of Resource]'
labels: ['resource', 'enhancement']
assignees: ''
---

**Resource Title:**
A concise title for the resource.

**Resource URL:**
The full URL to the resource (e.g., `https://example.com/useful-tool`).

**Description:**
A brief, one-sentence description of what the resource is and why it's useful.

**Category:**
Choose one:
- University
- Academics
- Co-op
- Student life
- Developer tools
- Community
- Other (please specify)

**Official Link?**
Is this an official University of Waterloo link or resource?
- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No

**Additional Notes (Optional):**
Any other information you'd like to provide.
